subject: keycap-cluster
composition: Six CYL-profile keycaps in a two-row editorial cluster: back row — stroke-only outline cap (left), near-black warm-burgundy alpha with blood-red legend wash (centre, stepped 18px forward), near-black warm-burgundy alpha (right); front row — near-black warm-burgundy alpha (left), near-black focal alpha with strong blood-red legend wash and bronze edge stroke (centre), stroke-only outline cap (right). Diagonal offset between rows mimics a freshly-tipped keycap tray. Eclipse splash ellipse in blood-red at 0.10 alpha behind the cluster. Bronze theme dot at upper-right margin. Blood-red accent pip at lower-right. Dark warm-burgundy background fill #120808. Four filled dark caps carry oklch(0.14 0.025 18) body; inset dish surfaces step to oklch(0.18 0.030 18); CYL scoop arcs in dim warm-red oklch(0.60 0.12 28) so they read on the near-black body. Blood-red legend-face wash at 0.18 alpha on flanking caps and 0.34 alpha on the focal, evoking the translucent-red outer doubleshot over the tinted inner shot. Focal cap outer stroke uses bronze oklch(0.80 0.135 75) at 0.55 opacity as a warm metallic edge highlight.
notes: GMK CYL Pandemonium Berserk eclipse theme by Delta Key Co. Near-black body #1a0a0a approximated as oklch(0.14 0.025 18) — very dark, warm-burgundy-tinged, not flat black. Blood-red accent #cc2200 approximated as oklch(0.44 0.195 28) — warm coral/blood-red, evokes the translucent red doubleshot legends. Canvas is 1200x630 (16:2.1 portrait-safe ratio for the group-buy card), compared to the 1200x750 hero-art standard, per brief. Two flanking caps rendered as stroke-only outlines for compositional balance.
